scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.vercel-build: npm run build -w shared && npm run db:generate -w server && npm run build -w server && node scripts/run-turso-migrate.mjs && npm run build -w client
